## Checklist

- [ ] Changes work as described
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] `npm test` passes (29 tests)
- [ ] If a script changed: bash files pass `bash -n`, Python file passes `python3 -m py_compile`
- [ ] If a recipe / reference was added: linked from the table in `SKILL.md` AND `SKILL-OC.md`
- [ ] Markdown reads cleanly without AI slop (no "leverage", "harness", "delve", "tapestry", "in today's landscape")
- [ ] Conventional commit format in PR title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`)
- [ ] If this is repo housekeeping (templates, README, SVGs, metadata): used `chore:` (NOT `feat:`)
